expectations.text: Output contains 'Layer 1' (or equivalent Visual/Frontend section heading)
expectations.evidence: Uses 'Key Findings' with numbered sub-sections — no Layer 1/2/3 structure

expectations.text: Output contains 'Layer 2' (or equivalent Code Quality section heading)
expectations.evidence: No Layer 2 heading; findings are mixed into a single narrative

expectations.text: Output contains 'Layer 3' (or equivalent Security/GDPR section heading)
expectations.evidence: No Layer 3 heading; security mentioned in passing under 'Confidentiality'

expectations.text: Output contains at least one severity label: BLOCKER, SHOULD-FIX, or NICE-TO-HAVE
expectations.evidence: No BLOCKER/SHOULD-FIX/NICE-TO-HAVE labels; uses narrative strength signals only

expectations.text: Output contains a file reference in the format 'file:line' or 'src/pages/index.astro'
expectations.evidence: Mentions 'src/pages/index.astro' by name but no line numbers

expectations.text: Output contains a Summary section with finding counts
expectations.evidence: Has 'Summary' but it's project status ('Foundation is solid'), not finding counts

expectations.text: Layer 1 has more findings than Layer 2 (visual is strictest)
Output flags the generic 'Astro' title as a finding
No evidence of editing src/ files (no Write/Edit tool calls)
expectations.evidence: Read-only Explore subagent, no src/ edits
